title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: Vibe coding as a team sport, teaching interviewers to surface real signal, what's missing from leadership offsites, and more
description: This community-driven digest surfaces practical insights from product and design leaders on emerging topics like collaborative coding practices and recruitment effectiveness. Gain battle-tested wisdom from peers navigating similar challenges in modern product development.

title: Top 7 Claude Code Skills Repos for Product Designers
description: As AI coding assistants become essential tools for product teams, this curated guide reveals the most effective Claude Code skills repositories tailored specifically for designers. Learn how to leverage pre-built skills to dramatically accelerate your workflow without building from scratch.

title: Why Every AI Coding Assistant Needs a Memory Layer
description: AI coding assistants lose critical context between sessions, leading to repeated mistakes and inefficient code generation—a persistent memory layer solves this fundamental problem. This article explains why statelessness is crippling productivity and how to architect better tools.

title: Your ReAct Agent Is Wasting 90% of Its Retries — Here's How to Stop It
description: Most AI agents are hemorrhaging computational resources on impossible retry patterns, with a 200-task benchmark revealing 90.8% of retries wasted on hallucinated tool calls. This critical findings exposes a major inefficiency in current agent design that impacts both cost and reliability.

title: 10 Claude Code Tips & Tricks from Boris Cherny for Product Teams
description: Learn directly from Claude Code's creator on how product teams can unlock the tool's full potential with insider tips and practical techniques. This guide bridges the gap between basic usage and expert-level productivity for non-engineers on product teams.
